description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows along the rear facade, providing expansive views and natural light, especially towards the pool area. The house is surrounded by a manicured lawn with several palm trees, and includes a driveway leading to a covered carport at the front. The backyard boasts a spacious rectangular swimming pool with adjacent lounge chairs, emphasizing outdoor living. The exterior is predominantly white, with clean lines and a sleek, geometric layout. The overall design prioritizes openness, simplicity, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a pool, and minimalist landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, and main entrance, with palm trees and a manicured lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and the pool area extending to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view showcasing the large windows, pool, and outdoor lounge area, emphasizing the open backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof, side windows, and the pool's position relative to the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, no steps, and a covered carport adjacent to the entrance
